summary: M376 — UI fixes: docs.html capped at 1100px container + 760px article width (was full-screen, hard to read on wide displays). Companion catalog rebuilt as a card grid (mirroring class-catalog) with portrait + name + type badge + stats strip + description; 480px breakpoint shrinks to 56px portrait. Sort moved into a dropdown (replaces sortable headers). Mobile layout no longer breaks.
